findings.description: Footer renders on mobile but has no bottom padding to clear the fixed BottomNav (62px). The pb-16 is only on <main>, not on a wrapper that includes the Footer. On mobile, Footer content will be partially obscured by the fixed BottomNav overlay.
Body paragraphs use text-sm (14px) which is below the 16px minimum for body content readability and WCAG zoom compliance. Same issue in app/faq/page.tsx:79 for FAQ answer text.
Footer link touch targets are approximately 18px tall (text-xs with no additional padding), well below the 44px minimum required by WCAG 2.5.5 and Apple HIG for mobile tap targets.
Unnecessary .map() that copies question/answer fields identically from FAQ_ITEMS. The FAQ_ITEMS array already matches the FaqItem interface and can be passed directly.

Emojis in HOW_IT_WORKS titles (emoji-prefixed content strings). CLAUDE.md says 'No emojis in code unless requested.' These are user-facing content, but the rest of the app does not use emojis in content.
vi.mock of internal BuyMeACoffeeButton component rather than mocking at a system boundary. The component requires PostHog useAnalytics context, making this a pragmatic boundary mock.
